prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该校在江西省理科（物理类）最低录取位次分别为约4763名→4585名→6247名→5340名→3030名，整体呈波动走势。2021–2022年稳定在4600名左右，202 3年大幅后移至6247名，2024年回升至5340名，2025年大幅前移至3030名，近两年位次波动剧烈，2025年基准位次约3030名；该校在江西省理科（物理类）招生 计划：2021年60人、2022年59人、2023年78人、2024年83人、2025年80人；2026年计划55人，较2025年大幅缩减25人（缩招约31.3%），名额显著减少将加剧 竞争，推动最低位次前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 哈尔滨工业大学（威海）为985、211、双一流高校，隶属哈尔滨工业大学（本部软科2026年主榜第12名，Top20），威海校区共享哈 工大品牌声誉与学科资源，对高分考生有较强吸引力；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音学校热度总排名第10（高热），短视频平台曝光量 大，反映报考关注度较高，可能进一步推高竞争热度；依托哈工大本部学科实力，拥有A+学科（力学、机械工程、材料科学与工程、环境科学与工程）、A学科 （计算机科学与技术、控制科学与工程、电气工程、软件工程、仪器科学与技术、数学、管理科学与工程）及多个A-学科，工科整体实力顶尖，对理科考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校位于山东威海，非 江西省本地高校，无省内招生倾斜；跨省报考需考虑地域偏好因素，但哈工大品牌效应可部分抵消地域劣势；2026年计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业持续高热推荐，与该校招生专业高度吻合；江西省2026年普通高考总人数474900人，按近年物理 类占比约56.4%估算物理类考生约26.8万人，较2025年物理类26.6万人略有增加，竞争略有加剧；2026年。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3030名、2026年招生计划大幅 缩减31.3%（名额减少加剧竞争）、抖音高热关注度、工科专业热度持续升温以及本省考生数量微增等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年显著前移；预测最低位次约2482名 ，区间2128–2836名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for this university in Jiangxi Province's science (physics category) were approximately 4763 → 4585 → 6247 → 5340 → 3030, showing a fluctuating trend. In 2021–2022, it stabilized around 4600, then significantly dropped to 6247 in 2023, rebounded to 5340 in 2024, and sharply moved forward to 3030 in 2025. The rankings have fluctuated dramatically in recent two years, with a baseline ranking of about 3030 in 2025. The enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Jiangxi Province: 60 in 2021, 59 in 2022, 78 in 2023, 83 in 2024, 80 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 55, a significant reduction of 25 from 2025 (a decrease of about 31.3%). The notable reduction in slots will intensify competition, pushing the minimum ranking forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Institute of Technology (Weihai) is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, affiliated with Harbin Institute of Technology (main campus ranked 12th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, Top 20). The Weihai campus shares the brand reputation and disciplinary resources of HIT, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. The university ranks 10th in overall popularity on Douyin (high heat), with significant exposure on short video platforms, reflecting high application attention, which may further increase competition heat. Leveraging the disciplinary strength of HIT's main campus, it has A+ disciplines (Mechanics, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Environmental Science and Engineering), A disciplines (Computer Science and Technology, Control Science and Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Software Engineering, Instrument Science and Technology, Mathematics, Management Science and Engineering), and multiple A- disciplines. Its overall engineering strength is top-tier, strongly attracting science candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: The university is located in Weihai, Shandong, not a local university in Jiangxi Province, so there is no provincial admission preference. Cross-province applications need to consider regional preference factors, but the HIT brand effect can partially offset the location disadvantage. In 2026, engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, closely matching the university's enrollment majors. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangxi Province general college entrance examination is 474,900. Estimating the physics category proportion at about 56.4% based on recent years, the number of physics category candidates is approximately 268,000, a slight increase from 266,000 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition. 2026.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3030, the significant reduction of 31.3% in the 2026 enrollment plan (fewer slots intensifying competition), high Douyin attention, continuously rising popularity of engineering majors, and a slight increase in the number of local candidates, the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to move significantly forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2482, with a range of 2128–2836.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information) (Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Cyberspace Security, Automation, Communication Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering, Integrated Circuit Design and Integration System, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Automation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Intelligent Manufacturing Excellent Talent Program) (Robotics Engineering, Mechanical Design and Manufacturing and Automation, Materials Science and Engineering, Welding Technology and Engineering, Material Forming and Control Engineering, Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering, Intelligent Vehicle Engineering, Energy Storage Science and Engineering, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments)
- Software Engineering (Excellent Talent Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Science and Engineering Cross Excellent Talent Program) (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking of 2482 is in the middle of the range 2128–2836. It is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice (Future Intelligent Manufacturing Excellent Talent Program, Software Engineering), use Tier 1 Future Information majors as a reach (requiring a ranking significantly better than the lower bound of 2128), and Tier 3 Science and Engineering Cross Excellent Talent Program as a safety. The university's engineering strength is top-tier, and the flexible major selection mechanism within the class allows further direction selection based on interest after admission.
